docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SANTOS, ELVIA AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, GLADYS   TRUSTEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, GLADYS   TRUSTEE
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JOHN TEALDI, 300 WASHINGTON ST.,DALY CITY,CA 94015
CIVIL SUBPENA SERVED ON JOHN TEALDI, FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTOS, ELVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KENNEDY, GLADYS   TRUSTEE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
